summary: Promote verification-hotspot control from observe to canary for selected repos after health-signal baseline stabilizes.
rationale: Trace and waiver history show stable rollback posture but incomplete promotion evidence for broad enforce mode.
expected_impact: Improves rollout confidence while keeping fail-closed behavior and human review checkpoints.

mutation_guard.enforcement_note: Proposal records are advisory until an explicit implementation task is approved.

proposed_changes: add canary promotion threshold checks to control rollout review
require explicit rollback drill evidence before enforce transitions
notes: Illustrates a controlled proposal that cannot mutate policy directly.
